title: Upholsterers
description: Make, repair, or replace upholstery for household furniture or transportation vehicles.

tasks.text: Fit, install, and secure material on frames, using hand tools, power tools, glue, cement, or staples.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Measure and cut new covering materials, using patterns and measuring and cutting instruments, following sketches and design specifications.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Build furniture up with loose fiber stuffing, cotton, felt, or foam padding to form smooth, rounded surfaces.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Make, restore, or create custom upholstered furniture, using hand tools and knowledge of fabrics and upholstery methods.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Read work orders, and apply knowledge and experience with materials to determine types and amounts of materials required to cover workpieces.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Examine furniture frames, upholstery, springs, and webbing to locate defects.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Adjust or replace webbing, padding, or springs, and secure them in place.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Sew rips or tears in material, or create tufting, using needles and thread.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Remove covering, webbing, padding, or defective springs from workpieces, using hand tools such as hammers and tack pullers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Attach fasteners, grommets, buttons, buckles, ornamental trim, and other accessories to covers or frames, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Repair furniture frames and refinish exposed wood.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Interweave and fasten strips of webbing to the backs and undersides of furniture, using small hand tools and fasteners.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Draw cutting lines on material following patterns, templates, sketches, or blueprints, using chalk, pencils, paint, or other methods.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Stretch webbing and fabric, using webbing stretchers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate sewing machines or sew upholstery by hand to seam cushions and join various sections of covering material.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Design upholstery cover patterns and cutting plans, based on sketches, customer descriptions, or blueprints.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain records of time required to perform each job.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Discuss upholstery fabrics, colors, and styles with customers, and provide cost estimates.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Pick up and deliver furniture.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Attach bindings or apply solutions to edges of cut material to prevent raveling.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Collaborate with interior designers to decorate rooms and coordinate furnishing fabrics.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Make, repair, or replace automobile upholstery and convertible and vinyl tops, using knowledge of fabric and upholstery methods.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
